description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of dark gray and white walls, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front yard is landscaped with two prominent trees and a green lawn, while the backyard includes a fenced area and a tennis court. There is a driveway leading to a garage on the left side, and a small patio or outdoor seating area adjacent to the house. The house appears to have multiple entry points, including a main front door and a side entrance near the garage. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and functional, contemporary architecture.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, a driveway, and a tennis court. The exterior is primarily dark gray with white accents and includes a garage and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large trees, and the front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and fenced patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, tennis court, and back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, part of the backyard, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and flanked by two large trees; no porch or columns, minimal overhang.
